businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance de mesure par rapport au fil.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia de medición desde el cable.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Low Q factor indicates broader frequency response.
suggestedActions: Verify component tolerances affect circuit performance.
Use proper safety equipment for high voltage/current work.

description.short: Calculate magnetic flux density around a long straight wire.
description.long: Calculate magnetic flux density around a long straight wire.

short_i18n.en: Calculate magnetic flux density around a long straight wire.
short_i18n.tr: Sonsuz telin belirli mesafesindeki manyetik akı yoğunluğunu Ampere yasası ile hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die magnetische Flussdichte um einen langen geraden Draht.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la densité de flux magnétique autour d'un long fil droit.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la densidad de flujo magnético alrededor de un cable largo y recto.
short_i18n.ar: احسب كثافة التدفق المغناطيسي حول سلك طويل مستقيم.
